risk_notes: Installation is project-approved when performed in an auditable local environment.
Checks and smokes must not install packages silently.
Only Markdown/TXT are claimed as the stable Unstructured surface in this slice.
rollback_steps: Remove the project-local environment or uninstall unstructured from the selected environment.
blocker_evidence: Optional dependency 'unstructured' is not installed. Install the parser-unstructured extra or use backend=builtin.
